subject: [PATCH v6 02/10] mm/memory_hotplug: add mhp_online_type_to_str() and export string helpers

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Acknowledged the patch without raising any concerns or objections.

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch adds two string helpers for memory hotplug: mhp_online_type_to_str() and its inverse, mhp_online_type_from_str(). The former converts an integer online type to a human-readable string, while the latter does the reverse. Both functions are exported so that drivers can use them in their sysfs interfaces.
